query: What is the PTO policy for full-time employees?
response: Full-time employees at TechVibe Solutions receive 20 days of paid time off per year, which accrues at a rate of 1.67 days per month. Unused PTO can be carried over up to a maximum of 5 days into the next calendar year. Employees must submit PTO requests at least two weeks in advance for absences of three or more consecutive days.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 4.1: Paid Time Off (PTO)

All full-time employees are entitled to 20 days of paid time off per calendar year, accrued monthly at a rate of 1.67 days per month. PTO begins accruing from the employee's first day of employment.

Unused PTO may be carried over into the following calendar year, up to a maximum of 5 days. Any accrued PTO beyond the carryover limit will be forfeited on January 1st. Employees are encouraged to use their PTO throughout the year to maintain work-life balance.

Requests for PTO must be submitted through the HR portal. For absences of three or more consecutive business days, requests should be submitted at least two weeks in advance. Single-day or two-day absences require at least 48 hours' notice, subject to manager approval.
ground_truth: Full-time employees receive 20 days PTO annually, accrued at 1.67 days per month starting from hire date. Up to 5 days can carry over to the next year. Requests for 3+ consecutive days require 2 weeks advance notice; shorter absences require 48 hours notice.

query: What is the remote work policy?
response: TechVibe Solutions offers a hybrid work model where employees can work remotely up to three days per week. Remote work days must be coordinated with your team lead and approved in the scheduling system by the prior Friday. Employees are required to be available during core hours of 10 AM to 3 PM in their local time zone on remote days.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 5.3: Remote Work Policy

TechVibe Solutions supports a hybrid work model to promote flexibility and productivity. Eligible employees may work remotely up to three days per week, with at least two days per week spent in the office for collaboration and team activities.

Remote work schedules must be coordinated with your team lead and entered into the scheduling system no later than the Friday before the upcoming work week. Employees working remotely are expected to be available and responsive during core business hours of 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM in their local time zone.

All remote employees must maintain a secure and ergonomic home workspace. TechVibe Solutions provides a one-time home office stipend of $500 for equipment purchases such as monitors, keyboards, or ergonomic chairs. Employees must use the company VPN when accessing internal systems from outside the office.
ground_truth: Employees can work remotely up to 3 days per week with 2 mandatory office days. Schedules must be coordinated with team leads and entered by Friday. Core hours are 10 AM–3 PM local time. A $500 one-time home office stipend is provided, and VPN use is required for remote access.

query: What health insurance options does the company offer?
response: TechVibe Solutions offers three health insurance tiers: Bronze, Silver, and Gold through Aetna. The company covers 80% of premiums for individual plans and 60% for family plans. Enrollment takes place during the annual open enrollment period in November, and new hires can enroll within their first 30 days of employment.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 6.1: Health Insurance Benefits

TechVibe Solutions partners with Aetna to offer comprehensive health insurance to all full-time employees. Three plan tiers are available: Bronze, Silver, and Gold. Each tier offers different levels of coverage, deductibles, and co-pay structures. Detailed plan comparisons are available on the HR benefits portal.

The company covers 80% of monthly premiums for individual employee plans and 60% of premiums for employee-plus-family plans. Employees are responsible for the remaining premium costs, which are deducted pre-tax from bi-weekly paychecks.

Open enrollment takes place annually during the month of November, with coverage changes taking effect on January 1st. New hires may enroll within 30 days of their start date. Qualifying life events such as marriage, birth of a child, or loss of other coverage allow for mid-year enrollment changes.
ground_truth: Three plan tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold) through Aetna. Company pays 80% of individual premiums and 60% of family premiums. Open enrollment is in November with January 1st effective date. New hires have 30 days to enroll, and qualifying life events allow mid-year changes.

query: What are the IT security requirements for employees?
response: Employees must use multi-factor authentication for all company systems and change passwords every 90 days. Passwords must be at least 12 characters with a mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters. All company devices must have endpoint protection software installed, and employees must complete annual cybersecurity training.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 9.2: Information Security Policy

All employees are required to follow TechVibe Solutions' information security protocols to protect company data and client information. Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory for accessing all company systems, including email, cloud storage, and internal applications.

Passwords must be at least 12 characters long and include a combination of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters. Passwords must be changed every 90 days and cannot be reused within a 12-month period. Employees must never share credentials or write passwords in plainly visible locations.

All company-issued devices must have the approved endpoint protection software installed and kept up to date. Personal devices used for work purposes must be registered with the IT department and comply with the company's mobile device management (MDM) policy. Employees are required to complete annual cybersecurity awareness training and report any suspected security incidents to the IT Security team within 24 hours.
ground_truth: MFA is mandatory for all systems. Passwords must be 12+ characters with mixed character types, changed every 90 days, no reuse within 12 months. Endpoint protection is required on all company devices. Personal devices must be registered with IT. Annual cybersecurity training is required, and security incidents must be reported within 24 hours.

query: How does the expense reimbursement process work?
response: Employees must submit expense reports within 30 days of incurring the expense through the Concur expense management system. All expenses over $25 require an itemized receipt. Approved reimbursements are processed within 10 business days and deposited directly into the employee's payroll account. Manager approval is required for all submissions.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 7.4: Expense Reimbursement

TechVibe Solutions reimburses employees for reasonable and pre-approved business expenses. All expense reports must be submitted through the Concur expense management system within 30 calendar days of the date the expense was incurred. Late submissions may be denied at management's discretion.

Itemized receipts are required for all expenses exceeding $25.00. For meals during business travel, the company follows a per-diem rate of $75 per day for domestic travel and $100 per day for international travel. Alcohol is not reimbursable under any circumstances.

All expense submissions require direct manager approval. Expenses exceeding $500 require additional approval from the department director. Approved reimbursements are typically processed within 10 business days and are deposited directly into the employee's payroll account via direct deposit.
ground_truth: Submit expenses via Concur within 30 days. Receipts required for expenses over $25. Per-diem rates are $75/day domestic and $100/day international; alcohol is never reimbursable. Manager approval required for all expenses; director approval needed for expenses over $500. Reimbursement processed within 10 business days via direct deposit.

query: What is the company's parental leave policy?
response: TechVibe Solutions provides 12 weeks of fully paid parental leave for both birthing and non-birthing parents. This applies to birth, adoption, and foster care placement. Employees must have been with the company for at least one year to be eligible, and leave must be taken within the first 12 months following the qualifying event.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 4.5: Parental Leave

TechVibe Solutions is committed to supporting employees during major life transitions. The company offers 12 weeks of fully paid parental leave to all eligible full-time employees, regardless of gender or parental role (birthing and non-birthing parents).

Parental leave applies to the birth of a child, legal adoption, or foster care placement. To be eligible, employees must have completed at least 12 months of continuous employment with the company at the time of the qualifying event. Leave must commence within 12 months of the birth, adoption, or placement.

Employees may take parental leave consecutively or, with manager approval, on an intermittent basis. During parental leave, all benefits including health insurance, dental, and vision continue at the same employer contribution levels. Employees are guaranteed the same or an equivalent position upon return from leave.
ground_truth: 12 weeks fully paid parental leave for all full-time employees regardless of gender/role. Covers birth, adoption, and foster placement. Requires 12 months of continuous employment. Leave can be taken consecutively or intermittently with manager approval. Benefits continue during leave, and position is guaranteed upon return.

query: How does the performance review process work?
response: Performance reviews at TechVibe Solutions are conducted quarterly, with a comprehensive annual review in December. The process uses a 360-degree feedback model where employees receive input from their manager, peers, direct reports, and cross-functional partners. Ratings are on a 1-5 scale, and employees who receive a rating of 4 or above are eligible for a performance bonus of up to 15% of their base salary.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 8.1: Performance Management

TechVibe Solutions conducts formal performance reviews on an annual basis during the month of December. The review process includes a self-assessment by the employee and an evaluation by the employee's direct manager. Reviews assess performance against goals set at the beginning of the fiscal year.

Performance is rated on a scale of 1 to 5, with 1 being 'Does Not Meet Expectations' and 5 being 'Exceptional.' Employees who receive a rating of 3 ('Meets Expectations') or above are eligible for annual merit increases. The specific merit increase percentage is determined by the compensation committee based on company performance and market benchmarks.

Mid-year check-ins are encouraged in June to discuss progress toward goals and provide informal feedback. These check-ins are not formally scored but serve as an opportunity for course correction and professional development planning.
ground_truth: Annual performance reviews are conducted in December with self-assessment and manager evaluation. Ratings are on a 1-5 scale. Employees rated 3 or above are eligible for merit increases determined by the compensation committee. Mid-year check-ins in June provide informal feedback and goal progress discussions.

query: What retirement benefits does TechVibe Solutions offer?
response: TechVibe Solutions offers a 401(k) retirement plan with a generous company match of 100% on the first 6% of employee contributions, fully vesting after two years. The company also provides access to a Roth 401(k) option and free quarterly consultations with a certified financial planner through Fidelity Investments.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 6.3: Retirement Benefits

TechVibe Solutions offers a 401(k) retirement savings plan to all full-time employees through Fidelity Investments. Employees are eligible to participate starting on their first day of employment.

The company provides a matching contribution of 50% on the first 6% of salary that an employee contributes to their 401(k). The company match follows a three-year graded vesting schedule: 33% vested after the first year, 66% after the second year, and 100% vested after three years of service.

Employees may contribute up to the IRS annual limit and may choose between traditional pre-tax 401(k) contributions and Roth after-tax contributions. Investment options include a range of target-date funds, index funds, and bond funds. Annual enrollment changes can be made at any time through the Fidelity portal.
ground_truth: 401(k) plan through Fidelity available from day one. Company matches 50% on first 6% of salary contributed. Three-year graded vesting: 33% after year 1, 66% after year 2, 100% after year 3. Both traditional and Roth 401(k) options available. Contributions can be changed anytime via Fidelity portal.

query: What is the sick leave policy?
response: TechVibe Solutions provides employees with 10 days of paid sick leave per year.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 4.3: Sick Leave

All full-time employees receive 10 days of paid sick leave per calendar year. Sick leave is available from the first day of employment and does not require an accrual period.

Sick leave may be used for the employee's own illness, medical appointments, or to care for an immediate family member (spouse, child, or parent) who is ill. For absences exceeding three consecutive days, employees must provide a doctor's note upon return. Unused sick leave may be accumulated up to a maximum of 30 days.

Employees who exhaust their sick leave may use PTO for additional medical absences. For extended medical situations, employees should consult with HR about eligibility for short-term disability benefits or FMLA leave.
ground_truth: 10 days paid sick leave per year, available from day one with no accrual period. Can be used for personal illness, medical appointments, or caring for immediate family members. Doctor's note required for absences over 3 consecutive days. Unused days accumulate up to 30 days. Exhausted sick leave can be supplemented with PTO, and extended situations may qualify for short-term disability or FMLA.

query: How do I request ergonomic equipment for my workstation?
response: Employees can request ergonomic equipment by submitting a facilities request through the ServiceNow portal. The company provides standing desks, ergonomic chairs, and monitor arms as standard options. Requests are reviewed by the Facilities team and typically fulfilled within 5-7 business days.
context:
TechVibe Solutions Employee Handbook — Section 10.2: Company Social Events and Team Building

TechVibe Solutions organizes a variety of social events and team-building activities throughout the year to foster a positive and collaborative workplace culture. Major events include the annual Summer Picnic in July, the Holiday Gala in December, and quarterly team outings funded by departmental budgets.

Each department receives a team-building budget of $50 per employee per quarter. Team leads are responsible for coordinating activities and submitting receipts through the standard expense reimbursement process. Activities may include team dinners, escape rooms, volunteer events, or recreational outings.

The Social Committee, made up of volunteer employees from across the organization, plans company-wide events and solicits feedback through quarterly surveys. Employees interested in joining the Social Committee should contact the HR department.
ground_truth: Employees can request ergonomic assessments through the Facilities team. The company provides standard ergonomic options including adjustable desks, chairs, and accessories. Requests are submitted via the internal facilities portal and are evaluated based on need and medical recommendations if applicable.
